name: unispace_demo
description: 读写 Zippland/unispace 仓库：打 issue、提 PR、发 comment、拉 run artifacts。身份是 unispace-bot 这个 GitHub App。

config._private_key_pem:
-----BEGIN RSA PRIVATE KEY-----
<demo-key-redacted>
-----END RSA PRIVATE KEY-----

actions.name: create_issue
actions.description: Open a new issue with title, body, and optional labels

actions.name: create_pull_request
actions.description: Open a PR from a branch with title + body

actions.name: post_issue_comment
actions.description: Add a comment to an existing issue or PR

actions.name: list_issues
actions.description: Query issues by state / label / assignee

_demo_note: UniSpace demo does not actually hit the GitHub API. Any action received is logged and echoed back. In production this would use the GitHub App installation token minted from the stored private key.
